automatic_review: Run on every complete global experience iteration and persist a project-local review.

conditions: The owner contract, trigger, artifacts, maintained knowledge, and safety boundary remain unchanged.
The change has a recorded baseline, expected measurable benefit, no-regression validation, and rollback path.
The change is owner-scoped and is documentation-only, an internal subskill refinement, or a read-only/local-reversible script or workflow refactor.
The change uses an already available runtime and preserves all caller contracts.
The actual contract, trigger, artifacts, maintained knowledge, owning parent, and safety boundary remain unchanged.
Actual contract evidence, user-recognizable task language, and verified experience all favor the new stable name.
The canonical naming pattern, migration record, one-release compatibility route, reference updates, and global discovery interfaces are complete.
Test-SkillNameMigrations.ps1 and global-interface validation pass before the renamed capability is treated as active.
exclusions: add, merge, split, deprecate, delete, or materially revise an owner or skill
change runtime, credential, installation, publication, or safety authority

requires_explicit_authorization: add, merge, split, deprecate, or delete a top-level owner
material owner or skill contract, trigger, artifact, knowledge, or safety-boundary change
external, public, paid, credential, installation, runtime-changing, destructive, or irreversible action
Git commit, push, tag, release, or publication
required_evidence: rollback boundary and affected-owner routing review
